creator: jeroen.pulles@gmail.com
text:
Odd, from about 20 jails, I have three jails that work as I'm expecting it to, with detection of a conflict. 

All jails use the same FreeBSD repo, same OS (13.2-RELEASE-p1), and run the same version of pkg (1.20.4).
